esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-default
// High login rate may indicate connection pool misconfiguration or connection storm
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.login.rate IS NOT NULL
| STATS avg_login_rate = AVG(metrics.sqlserver.login.rate),
       instance_id = MAX(resource.attributes.service.instance.id)
  BY COALESCE(resource.attributes.service.instance.id, host.name, "unknown")
// Adjust threshold (logins/s) based on baseline; 50/s is a starting point for investigation
| WHERE avg_login_rate > 50.0
| KEEP instance_id, avg_login_rate
